title: Pseudo Anonymised Medical History of Cancers or Benign Tumors from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the medical history section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of other cancers and benign tumors. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

OtherCancersBenignTumors.description: Other (non-breast) cancers and benign tumours reported by the participant (up to 3).

R0_OtherCancerBenignTumors_Num.description: Number of other benign cancer tumors instances.

R0_OtherCancerBenignTumor.x-question: Have you ever been diagnosed with this other type of cancer or benign tumour (not including breast cancer), including leukaemia, Hodgkinâ€™s disease or other lymphoma?
R0_OtherCancerBenignTumor.description: Whether the participant was diagnosed with this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour.

R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisYear_Shifted.name: R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisYear_Shifted
R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisYear_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisAge.x-question: If yes, at what age was this other type of cancer or benign tumour diagnosed?
R0_OtherCancerDiagnosisAge.description: Participant's age at diagnosis of this other (non-breast) cancer or benign tumour.

OtherCancersBenignTumorsExtra.description: Other (non-breast) cancers and benign tumours reported by the participant extra information.

R0_MoreNonBreastCancers.x-question: If you have been diagnosed with non-breast cancer more than once, please provide details.
R0_MoreNonBreastCancers.description: Flag indicating the participant has had more than one non-breast cancer/benign tumour diagnosis.
